File.title: CloudFileMetadata
File.description: Metadata for files, folders, and shared assets stored in S3 and Firestore.

ownerId.description: The unique ID of the user owning this file or folder.

fileName.description: The name of the S3 key object filename.

originalName.description: The client-provided or display name of the uploaded file.

fileSize.description: Size of the uploaded file asset in bytes.

mimeType.description: The IANA media mime-type or 'folder' key status indicator.

s3Key.description: The actual full key pointing inside the target AWS S3 user bucket folder.

starred.description: Indicates whether this item has been marked as high-priority starred favorites.

trashed.description: Indicates whether the asset sits in the active user Trash bin collection.

folderId.description: Owner ID folder parent category path for nested navigation tree nodes.

/files/{fileId}.description: Individual files and nested folders records database collection index.
